content:
🌟 phantom | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a persistent, autonomous AI co-worker that can independently manage tasks, build tools, and evolve its capabilities within its own dedicated environment, freeing up user resources.
✨ Key Features: • Persistent memory and self-evolution • Dedicated computing environment (its own computer) • Autonomous software installation and infrastructure building
📖 Summary: Phantom is an AI co-worker designed to be persistent and self-evolving, acting as an independent agent with its own dedicated computing environment. It goes beyond typical chatbots by installing software, managing data, and building infrastructure autonomously, improving its capabilities over time.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
